title: GitHub Info Reader
description: Enter a GitHub token to read the authenticated user profile and accessible repositories. The token stays in memory only and is not persisted locally.

form.hint: Use a least-privilege token when possible. The tool does not write the token to localStorage.

result.empty: Enter a token and load the data.
result.repoEmpty: The token returned no repositories, or no accessible repositories were found.

notes: This implementation uses the GitHub REST API endpoints /user and /user/repos.
Repositories are sorted by most recently updated and limited to 30 items.
With limited scopes, the user profile may load while repository visibility stays partial or empty.
